---
title: "Single Cell RNA-seq Workshop"
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 40em
links:
  - text: Email
    icon: envelope
    href: mailto:wcresko@uoregon.edu
---

Welcome to the Single Cell RNA-seq Workshop. This website hosts the lectures, hands-on exercises, datasets, and reference material for the workshop. It was built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/websites).

Use the navigation bar above to access the schedule, lecture slides, exercises, required software, and additional resources.
